FontSize.$description:
Used for small, all-caps labels that introduce a group of related items — side nav sections, filter group headers, dropdown menu sections, or grouped fields in a form. It signals "these belong together."

This is not a heading. If the text introduces new page content (like "Account Settings" above a form), use Heading/Section instead. If it names a button or input, use Label/Button or Label/Input.
